mapper.select: SELECT ur.record_id AS recordId, ur.room_id AS roomId, ur.device_id AS deviceId, ur.record_type AS recordType, ur.reading_time AS readingTime, ur.previous_reading AS previousReading, ur.current_reading AS currentReading, ur.usage_amount AS usageAmount, ur.amount, ur.operator_name AS operatorName, ur.remark, ur.del_flag AS delFlag, ur.create_by AS createBy, ur.create_time AS createTime, ur.update_by AS updateBy, ur.update_time AS updateTime, r.name AS roomName, d.device_name AS deviceName, d.device_code AS deviceCode FROM biz_room_utility_record ur LEFT JOIN ics_room r ON r.id = ur.room_id LEFT JOIN biz_smart_device d ON d.device_id = ur.device_id WHERE ur.del_flag = '0' AND ur.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY ur.reading_time DESC, ur.record_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_room_utility_record SET del_flag = '1', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND del_flag = '0'
